name: Patrick Perez
title: Software Engineer
glitchPhrases: Backends That Scale,Data-Driven Solutions,Full-Stack Applications,High-Performance Systems
quote: Building systems that last — solving problems that matter.
bio: I am a results-driven Software Engineer with expertise in backend development and a strong foundation in C, C++, Python, and Java, as well as frontend technologies including JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. I specialize in building efficient, scalable, and high-performance applications, with experience in databases, system optimization, and problem-solving. I am currently focused on mastering C# to expand my skill set and take on new challenges in software development.
address: 97B Purok Masagana, Pinagbarilan, Baliuag, Bulacan, Philippines
highlights: Backend Engineering — C · C++ · Python · Java
Database Management — Informix SQL · MySQL · PostgreSQL

services.title: Backend Development
services.desc: Building efficient, scalable, and high-performance backend systems using C, C++, Python, and SQL databases.

services.title: Database Optimization
services.desc: Designing and optimizing database structures, improving query performance, and ensuring data integrity across platforms.

services.title: Web Development
services.desc: Creating responsive and dynamic websites with modern frontend technologies and robust backend integrations.

services.title: Debugging & Optimization
services.desc: Identifying and resolving software bugs, memory leaks, and performance bottlenecks to enhance stability and speed.

services.title: System Integration
services.desc: Integrating APIs, third-party services, and legacy systems into modern applications to improve functionality and data flow.

services.title: Algorithms & Data Structures
services.desc: Providing optimized solutions for complex problems using efficient algorithms to enhance software performance.
